title: dichromena pusilla
intro: Dichromena pusilla, also known as the fairy orchid or fairy helmet, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Dichromena pusilla include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as an infusion or decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional before attempting to use it as a treatment.
